daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Sag. You're radiating that infectious optimism energy—people are literally drawn to your vibe. Trust your gut on new connections, whether they're people or opportunities.
daily.love: Your heart's speaking louder than usual rn. If you've been holding back on being vulnerable with someone, today's giving permission to go for it. Single? Someone's definitely noticing your glow.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. This is peak energy for pitching that project or having the conversation you've been sitting on. Your confidence is your superpower—lean into it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Even a short walk outside can reset your whole mood. Listen to what makes you feel alive, not what you think you *should* do.

weekly.overview: Your vibe is shifting toward authenticity this week, babe. The cosmos is basically asking you to drop the act and lean into what actually makes you feel alive. Expect some meaningful realizations.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, there's a cosmic nudge toward deeper conversations. If you've been holding back how you really feel, this is your sign to speak up. Vulnerability hits different rn.
weekly.career: Creative energy is flowing, and your ideas are actually hitting. This is the week to pitch that project or initiative you've been sitting on. Trust your instincts—they're surprisingly sharp right now.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Whether it's a walk, dancing, or whatever gets you grounded, honor that call. Mental clarity comes easier when you're actually taking care of yourself.
